reviews.review_text: Friendly staff, very clean amenities. Park is a bit dated but offers everything we required. Good price too.

Sarah and her team at Capel Caravan Park are the BEST! We will come back to stay anytime we are in the area just for them! In addition, the location is great, the park is well-maintained and quiet, bathrooms were clean, and we loved cooking on the BBQ! Great stay - highly recommend :)

Antony and Sarah are so friendly and welcoming. I had a rough day on the road and found them after hours, they couldn’t be more helpful. I wandered down to the Capel foreshore and was treated with an amazing sunset and fairy floss skies over Port Phillip Bay. Finished the evening off with a swim in the park’s warm pool. A great end to a trying day. The sites are lovely thick soft grass. The amenities are very clean, lots of toilets and showers available. The showers are great retro design where you have space and your stuff stays dry! The camp kitchen/laundry has a fridge, kettle and microwave. No cooktop but the bbq by the pool is great. There is even a games room. Ended up staying longer as they were so accommodating.

I spent over a week at Capel Caravan Park recently and was absolutely blown away by the park!
The managers, Anthony and Sarah, are a wonderful couple. Their service is second to none, with Anthony taking time out of his evening to help me sort out power when it went out during a storm. They're also great for a chat.
There's plenty to keep everyone entertained, the pool and spa are great, there's also a games room, playground and bbq area.
The amenities are well maintained and kept clean. There's bins all over the place that are regularly emptied also.
It's a perfect base for exploring the Peninsula, and everything you need is very close. Rosebud Plaza is less than 5 minutes drive away and the Capel Sound shops and beach are less than 10 minutes walk.
I'm very excited to come back next summer 😄

What can I say, a well managed park.  The management were lovely and so accommodating.  Nothing was too much, even walking you to your site on arrival.  The toilet facilities were clean, the grass was mown, your site bin was emptied everyday and the other regulars in the park were all lovely.  A nice quiet week away was what we wanted and what we got.  Thank you Sarah and Anthony for your hospitality, we will be back.
clean park well maintained

Anthony and Sarah were so lovely. That was our first time camping with the caravan. The place is very peaceful. Location is very good location. The beach is just 5-7 mins walking distance. Toilets and showers were so clean all the time. The people were very friendly who was staying there at the same time we stayed. The kids had so much fun there. I will definitely visit that place again.

We were going camping for the 1st time as two families, and we had a blast there. Anthony and Sarah  were very  welcoming, kind and helpful throughout our stay. They helped us find the best available spot to fit our two tents (and cars!) On a very busy day . The place was calm, no noise. The facilities were great.  Our kids had a blast playing the games in the well-equipped games room and the lovely outdoor pool which looked really great to play in. The bathrooms were well maintained. Though only staying for a single  night, we had a really fun time there, and it was near many great shops and breathtaking nature reserves and beaches Overall this park provided us with a calm comfortable and enjoyable stay to lodge in as we explored the surroundings of Mornington Peninsula.

Great place !!great location beach walking distance!!pool great size for everyone...toilets very clean!!under new management Sarah and Anthony they will go above and beyond to satisfy everyones expectations!!I will visit again!!!

I dont normally leave reviews but this place worth it!!I visit the Capel caravan park for first time for long weekend in a power site..im a single mum so it was just me and my son...the management "young couple"extremely kind and helpful..the toilets and showers super clean and nearby the power sites  ..there is a good size pool for kids and adults ..they have barbecue and kitchen its 7-10 minutes walk to the beach 3 minutes drive to the shops and restaurants..kids and family's and older couples friendly caravan park and cheaper than anywhere else..they also have a beautiful family that goes very often with a Cafe-trailer and makes amazing coffee!I will definitely visit again it felt a lot like home!!

Such a great place Anthony and Sarah are so lovely and take great pride and care in the place! The unpowered spot was quite big and we were able to fit car, swag and gazebo comfortably! the toilets and all amenities are well taken care off and will definitely come back! ❤️
Sarah and Antony were so helpful, great caravan park for families. Toilets and showers are so clean.
Managers are really nice and care for the park very well
Sarah and Anthony are amazing hosts,the facility looks incredible and it is well maintained. Will definitely be there next year

Our family had a fantastic experience staying at this Caravan Park. Sarah & Anthony were amazing!  The facilities are the cleanest we have ever seen, the park is very well maintained. We’ll definitely be back!

A lovely, peaceful caravan park with a great community feel. Very clean, well looked after, great swimming pool. We couldn’t fault it and would happily stay again. New managers  Antony and  Sarah have brought this gem location back to life. Love  your work guys
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Fantastic caravan park! Clean, quiet, and very well maintained. The staff were friendly and helpful, and the atmosphere was welcoming. Great location and excellent facilities, we really enjoyed our stay and would definitely return.
Now Under new management powered and unpowered sites available

Sarah and Anthony are incredible. They go out of their way to accommodate your needs. The park is impeccably clean, the ablutions especially. The gardens and swimming pool is so well maintained. Definitely a 5 star caravan park. The best we have stayed at in ages. I highly recommend.
Staff are friendly very clean and awesome facilities! Huge pool and the kids also loved the games room

Great caravan park. Wonderful couple managing Antony & Sarah who work hard to keep the park neat and clean. Has a awesome and well maintained pool, bbq and playground area and is walking distance to beach & shops.
Great site - We stayed 2 nights unpowered in our van. Loved the pool and the site managers were super friendly. Everything clean and tidy, would stay again!
We have been traveling Aus for over 7 months now and Sarah and Anthony are by far the friendliest and most accommodating staff we have come across. We had such an awesome stay. Thanks guys 🙌🏽

We stayed here for two nights and felt very comfortable. Anthony and Sarah do everything they can to ensure you have a pleasant stay. They personally accompanied us to our site and gave us tips on activities in the area. The beach can be reached in a few minutes via a gravel road with no cars that runs alongside a small creek. There are cafés, restaurants and a small supermarket on the main road in front of the beach. The beach is very beautiful and the water was significantly warmer compared to the beaches on Phillip Island. Alternatively, you can go to the pool, which is nicer than it looks in the photos on the website.
The entire site – very clean
Amenities – very clean
Rubbish bins are located directly at the sites and are emptied daily.
We would love to come back!
Lovely park. Clean, quiet,  highly recommended.

This caravan park has the most helpful and friendly managers Sarah and Anthony
The improvements they have made since they have been here is amazing would definitely recommend
Thank you

Lovely hospitality from Antony and Sarah! I was able to get a last minute booking for an unpowered site in peak holiday season and they allowed me to check in quite late at 9:30pm. Facilities available include toilets, showers, laundry, dryer, drinks machine, games room, microwave and a playground and swimming pool. All at a reasonable price.

The managers live on site and the caravan park is a fun community. The kids even invited me to play cricket!
Under new management, powered and unpowered sites available

We just had a fantastic stay here last night. We arrived late - 8:30 pm. Anthony was able to get us a spot to stay. Toilets & showers were clean. Grass was mowed. Pool is clean. Friendly, warm & inviting. Yes it’s old but still very functional!!
I would stay here again.
Lovely campsite by the beach foreshore. Only one camp kitchen and I think it’s in block A. But the are a few BBQ’s and amenities blocks. Clean and tidy on all counts.
I am living here the people handling the place are awsum . Would love living here further
It's pretty much closing down.

I rang from Queensland management was able to help me and assure me of a booking that I needed on arrival and before arrival excellent communication very happy to be staying in the park for a short stay very friendly management
Friendly family owned caravan park, dog friendly, close to everything.

We have been annual tennants at the Capel Sound Caravan park for the past 12 years. Since new park managers (Simon and Stacey) were employed 3 years ago, the park has undergone some vast improvements - both facility wise and in the way the park is run. It is a fun friendly caravan park with a great pool.
I have a van here & i love it. the caravan park is always  clean, secure and well maintained. Management are very friendly and always helpful.

I have lived at the park for approximately 22 years and have seen a lot of changes e.g, managers, improvements etc. For the last 2 years Stacey and Simon have been managers, and in that time they have proven to be excellent in their approach to personal relations with the occupants. In addition they have steadily improved the park with well-kept landscapes and upgrading of camp sites. I would highly recommend this park for permanent and holiday purposes
